zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Richardson V於1608年7月3日出生在英國賀特福爾維斯特米爾時，他的父親Thomas Richardson39歲，母親Katherine Duxford42歲。他於1635年3月4日與Mary Bacon Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1651年8月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年43歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Richardson V于1608年7月3日出生在英国賀特福爾維斯特米爾时，他的父亲Thomas Richardson39岁，母亲Katherine Duxford42岁。他于1635年3月4日与Mary Bacon Baldwin在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1651年8月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年43岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Richardson V was born on 3 July 1608, in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Thomas Richardson, was 39 and his mother, Katherine Duxford, was 42. He married Mary Bacon Baldwin on 4 March 1635, in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 August 1651, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 43, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Richardson V est né le 3 juillet 1608, à Westmill, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Richardson, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Katherine Duxford, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Mary Bacon Baldwin le 4 mars 1635, à Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 août 1651, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Richardson V am 3. Juli 1608 in Westmill, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Richardson 39 und seine Mutter Katherine Duxford 42. Er hat am 4. März 1635 in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Bacon Baldwin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. August 1651 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson V è nato il il 3 luglio 1608 nel Westmill, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Richardson, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Duxford, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Mary Bacon Baldwin il 4 marzo 1635, nel Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 agosto 1651, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson Vが1608年7月3日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウエストミルで生まれた時，父Thomas Richardsonは39歳，母Katherine Duxfordは42歳であった。1635年3月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーチャーレストウンでMary Bacon Baldwinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1651年8月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで43歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Richardson V(이)가 1608년 7월 3일 영국 허트퍼드실르 웨스트미에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Richardson(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Duxford(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1635년 3월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운에서 Mary Bacon Baldwin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1651년 8월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Richardson V nasceu em 3 de julho de 1608, em Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Richardson, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Duxford, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Bacon Baldwin em 4 de março de 1635, em Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de agosto de 1651, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Richardson V родился 3 июля 1608 г. в местности вестмилл, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Richardson было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Duxford, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bacon Baldwin 4 марта 1635 г. в местности чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 августа 1651 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Richardson V nació el 3 de julio de 1608, en Westmill, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Richardson, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Katherine Duxford, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Mary Bacon Baldwin el 4 de marzo de 1635, en Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de agosto de 1651, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
